_comment: Pre-generated golden responses for the /p/resume-screener demo sample inputs. If the user submits the exact sample (canonical hash below matches), main.py returns this blob in <500ms. Any other input falls through to a live Gemini Flash call. Regenerate with `python3 scripts/gen-demo-cache.py` after changing the sample assets or canonical_input().

ranked.reasoning: Alice has 8 years of highly relevant Python backend experience, perfectly matching the required stack of FastAPI, Postgres, Redis, and AWS. She also brings strong high-throughput pipeline experience from her roles at Stripe and Plaid. However, she is based in San Francisco (UTC-8), which falls completely outside the required UTC-3 to UTC+3 timezone window.
ranked.match_summary: Exceptional technical fit with 8 years of Python, Postgres, and AWS experience, plus a proven track record building high-throughput APIs at top-tier companies.
gaps: Based in San Francisco (UTC-8), which is outside the required UTC-3 to UTC+3 timezone
No explicit engineering mentoring experience mentioned

ranked.reasoning: Bob is primarily a Node.js and React full-stack engineer, explicitly stating only 2 years of intermediate Python experience rather than the required 5+ years. Furthermore, his Postgres experience is limited to data migration scripts rather than core production backend services, and he lacks FastAPI experience.
